query: 偏股混合型基金规模最大的10只是哪些

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_size, s.asset_type FROM fund_size s WHERE s.asset_type = '偏股混合' AND s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '偏股混合')) SELECT l.fund_code AS 基金代码, l.fund_name AS 基金名称, l.fund_size AS 规模, p.portfolio_return AS 近一年收益率 FROM latest_size l JOIN fund_performance p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY l.fund_size DESC LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: 查询最新偏股混合型基金规模，并按规模降序排列，取前10名，同时显示对应的近一年收益率

notes: 未指定日期，使用 fund_size 最新日期，偏股混合型基金在 asset_type 中定义为 '偏股混合'，默认业绩区间为 '本年以来'
查询最新偏股混合型基金规模，并按规模降序排列，取前10名，同时显示对应的近一年收益率
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_size, s.asset_type FROM fund_size s WHERE s.asset_type = '偏股混合' AND s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '偏股混合')) SELECT l.fund_code AS 基金代码, l.fund_name AS 基金名称, l.fund_size AS 规模, p.portfolio_return AS 近一年收益率 FROM latest_size l JOIN fund_performance p ON l.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY l.fund_size DESC LIMIT 10

args.sql: SELECT fund_code AS 基金代码, fund_name AS 基金名称, fund_size AS 基金规模 FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '偏股混合' ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 10

metadata.sql: SELECT fund_code AS 基金代码, fund_name AS 基金名称, fund_size AS 基金规模 FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '偏股混合' ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 10

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size) SELECT fs.fund_code AS 基金代码, fs.fund_name AS 基金名称, fs.asset_type AS 基金类型, fs.fund_size AS 基金规模 FROM fund_size fs, latest_size ls WHERE fs.date = ls.max_date AND fs.asset_type LIKE '%偏股混合%' ORDER BY fs.fund_size DESC LIMIT 10

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size) SELECT fs.fund_code AS 基金代码, fs.fund_name AS 基金名称, fs.asset_type AS 基金类型, fs.fund_size AS 基金规模 FROM fund_size fs, latest_size ls WHERE fs.date = ls.max_date AND fs.asset_type LIKE '%偏股混合%' ORDER BY fs.fund_size DESC LIMIT 10
